---
title: "Tiny Bookdown Regression Fixture"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
---

# Welcome

Hello from a single-chapter bookdown.

This fixture exists to exercise the path where `rmarkdown::render` is invoked
on a bookdown project (because `content_category` is null in the manifest, so
the doc-render branch runs instead of the site branch). bookdown::gitbook's
post-processor then writes the chapter HTML to the working directory rather
than the requested `output_dir`. Without the fix in
`pkg/embed/R/rmarkdown_render.R` that reports `RenderDirectory` to the Go
side, `findOutputFileName` fails with "Unable to determine primary file".
